summary: Executed backend + frontend verification for GST tracker. Core flows pass on public URL; upstream localhost source is currently unavailable so app correctly shows Offline and keeps UI stable.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope.
Optional: keep an eye on browser mixed-content/CORS console noise from initial localhost polling attempt in HTTPS environments.
critical_code_review_comments: No hardcoded frontend backend URL usage issue found; frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and fallback list as requested.
Backend /api/transactions correctly returns 503 with explicit detail when localhost:8000 upstream is unreachable.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all core live/offline/table/polling checks pass; row-flash verification timing-sensitive)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI validated on public preview URL. Offline state and 5-second polling confirmed via observed repeated /api/transactions responses. Newest-first ordering validated with MOCKED /api responses in browser-route interception. Row-flash class observed in one mocked run but is ephemeral (1.2s), so assertions can be timing-sensitive.
rca of the issue: No functional blocker found. Expected 503/offline behavior is due to upstream localhost:8000/transactions being unavailable in this environment, not app crash or rendering failure.
